uplink.description: Temperature/humidity status report, report type 0x01 (synthetic in-bounds input; expected from upstream r315.js oracle)
uplink._note: fPort 6, reportType 0x01. Upstream oracle: Volt 2.8, Temp 27.8, Humi 53. Humidity 53% in-bounds (0-100). battery <- bytes[3]/10; air.temperature <- bytes[8..9] two's-complement /100; air.relativeHumidity <- bytes[10]*0.5.

uplink.description: Temperature/humidity report with negative temperature and low battery flag, report type 0x01 (synthetic in-bounds; oracle-derived)
uplink._note: fPort 6, reportType 0x01. bytes[3]=156 sets high-bit low-battery flag, residual 28 -> 2.8 V. Upstream oracle: Temp -5 (0xFE0C two's-complement), Humi 40 (bytes[10]=80*0.5). lowBattery surfaced as camelCase extra.

uplink.description: Combined temperature/humidity/illuminance report with alarm flags, report type 0x12 (synthetic in-bounds; oracle-derived)
uplink._note: fPort 6, reportType 0x12. Humidity raw 5000 (0x1388)*0.01 -> 50.00% in-bounds (0-100). Upstream oracle: Temp 22.5, Humidity 50%, Illuminance 825Lux, alarm byte 0x12 (bits: HighTemp, LowIllum set). air.temperature <- bytes[4..5] two's-complement /100; air.relativeHumidity <- bytes[6..7]*0.01; air.lightIntensity <- bytes[8..9]; alarm flags -> camelCase extras.

uplink.description: Startup/device-info report carries no measurement, report type 0x00 (TTN example bytes)
uplink._note: fPort 6, reportType 0x00. Upstream oracle decodes Device/SWver/HWver/Datecode only (no climate measurement). Normalized codec reports an error.

uplink.description: Temperature/humidity report flagged invalid carries no measurement, report type 0x01 (synthetic; oracle-derived)
uplink._note: fPort 6, reportType 0x01 with bytes[5] bit0 cleared (8 = even). Upstream oracle sets Temp 0xFFFF / Humi 0xFF (sensor reported no reading); normalized codec reports an error.

uplink.description: Illuminance-only report carries no climate measurement, report type 0x02 (synthetic; this device has no light sensor)
uplink._note: fPort 6, reportType 0x02. Shared R315 decoder emits illuminance + alarm flags only; R31505 has no light sensor and declares only the climate category, so this frame carries no climate measurement.

uplink.description: Sensor enable/state snapshot carries no measurement, report type 0x11 (TTN example bytes)
uplink._note: fPort 6, reportType 0x11. Upstream oracle decodes the function-enable/binary-sensor-state bitmaps only (no measurement). Normalized codec reports an error.

uplink.description: Config response on fPort 7 is unsupported (TTN example bytes)
uplink._note: fPort 7 carries ConfigReportRsp (config response, no measurement). Normalized codec rejects all non-6 fPorts.
